name: MobileAgentInfrastructureSettings
description: MobileAgentInfrastructureSettings schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access Configuration API

name.description: Name for the infrastructure settings configuration.

ip_pool.description: IP address pools for mobile user address allocation.

dns_servers.description: DNS server IP addresses for mobile users.

dns_suffix.description: DNS suffixes to append for mobile users.

regions.description: Compute regions for mobile user connectivity.

addresses.description: IP addresses for the mobile user gateway in this region.
